texts.label: text
texts.orig: Free Cancellation within 48hrs after confirmation date. 89 - 30 days prior to arrival = 25% of total invoice. 29 - 15 days prior to arrival = 75% of total invoice. 14 days or less prior to arrival = 100% of total invoice.
texts.text: Free Cancellation within 48hrs after confirmation date. 89 - 30 days prior to arrival = 25% of total invoice. 29 - 15 days prior to arrival = 75% of total invoice. 14 days or less prior to arrival = 100% of total invoice.
